name: FeelWorld P173-9HSD Broadcast Monitor
description: Featuring a full-HD IPS LCD panel, the FeelWorld P173-9HSD 17.3" Broadcast LCD Monitor can be used for 4K, HD, as well as SD workflows in studio, broadcast, and other professional video applications.

features.Key Features :: 17.3" 1920x1080 IPS LCD | Supports 4K, HD, and SD Formats | SDI, HDMI, DVI, YPbPr, Composite Inputs | 160° / 140° Viewing Angle | Safe Area Markers & Focus Aid Function | R/G/B-Only and Monochrome | Pixel-to-Pixel Mapping | Image Flip | 12V Battery or 4-Pin XLR Power | Includes U-Bracket
features.Standard Package: FeelWorld P173-9HSD 17.3" Broadcast LCD Monitor | Power Supply | V-Mount Battery Plate | Mini HDMI Cable | Tally Kit | Sunshade | U-Bracket
